code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const RANK_ICONS=['🥇','🥈','🥉'];const TeamRankings=_ref=>{let standings=_ref.standings,viewMode=_ref.viewMode;const sorted=[...standings].sort((a,b)=>{const aW=viewMode==='predicted'?a.predictedWins:a.actualWins;const bW=viewMode==='predicted'?b.predictedWins:b.actualWins;if(bW!==aW)return bW-aW;return b.opr-a.opr;});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"team-rankings",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"panel-title",children:viewMode==='predicted'?'🔮 Predicted Rankings':'📊 Actual Rankings'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"rankings-scroll",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"rankings-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"#"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Team"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"W"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"L"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"T"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"OPR"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:sorted.map((team,idx)=>{const wins=viewMode==='predicted'?team.predictedWins:team.actualWins;const losses=viewMode==='predicted'?team.predictedLosses:team.actualLosses;const ties=viewMode==='predicted'?team.predictedTies:team.actualTies;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{className:idx<3?"top-row rank-".concat(idx+1):'',children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:"cell-rank",children:idx<3?RANK_ICONS[idx]:idx+1}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("td",{className:"cell-team",children:["#",team.teamNumber]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:"cell-w",children:wins}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:"cell-l",children:losses}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:"cell-t",children:ties}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{className:"cell-opr",children:team.opr.toFixed(1)})]},team.teamNumber);})})]})})]});};export default TeamRankings;
